source: NTREIS via 10K Research / InfoSparks (live share links)

commentary.overview: The clearest split in Rockwall County right now is price. The three most affordable markets are still balanced, with Fate the tightest at 4.7 months of supply. The three priciest have tipped toward buyers: Heath is carrying 8.4 months of inventory, and the typical McLendon-Chisholm listing now takes 109 days to sell, more than double the pace in Fate or Rockwall. No submarket in the county is a seller's market this month.
